creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: araujo
Date: Thu Nov 19 01:59:12 UTC 2015
New revision: 401911
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/401911

Log:
  Map simple html back into markdown, e.g. if you want
  to import existing html data in a markdown based application.

  WWW: https://github.com/xijo/reverse_markdown

  PR:		ports/204662
  Submitted by:	mose <mose@gandi.net>

Changes:
  head/textproc/Makefile
  head/textproc/rubygem-reverse_markdown/
  head/textproc/rubygem-reverse_markdown/Makefile
  head/textproc/rubygem-reverse_markdown/distinfo
  head/textproc/rubygem-reverse_markdown/pkg-descr
